title: Senior Revenue Manager at Fortune Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Fortune Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Fortune Hotels in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fortune Hotels:
Fortune Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortune Hotels!
